direction.summary: VoEx in Propagation Zone means continued near-term downside toward LDPM-89 liquidity levels; will scale into larger shorts if bearish data persists.

direction.summary: VoEx erratic despite Inhibition Zone move; unsupportive heatmaps, cooling DLPs, mean-reversion risk. Downsizing longs, leaning short if downside develops.

direction.summary: VoEx moved further into Inhibition Zone: technical bullish BUPO, ride the wave; but vanna-unstable heatmaps, weak DLPs, and V2 imply a tenuous, reversal-prone run.
